title: mentha arvensis f. glabrata
intro: Mentha arvensis f. glabrata, also known as American wild mint, is a subspecies of the Mentha arvensis plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive-aiding compounds, and has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis f. glabrata include relieving digestive discomfort, reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
